title: BEM-866 inspect Claude mailbox workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
files = [Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_autoprocess.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/audit_mailbox_watcher.yml')]
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_workflow_lines')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for f in files:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
    for i, line in enumerate(text.splitlines(), 1):
        low = line.lower()
        if any(tok in low for tok in ['on:', 'workflow_dispatch', 'push:', 'paths:', 'schedule:', 'mailbox', 'to_curator', 'from_claude', 'claude', 'task_path', 'response_path', 'status:']):
            safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in str(f) + '_' + str(i))[:120]
            marker = outdir / (safe + '.md')
            marker.write_text('# Claude workflow line\nFile: ' + str(f) + '\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
            changed_files.append(str(marker))
            count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_WORKFLOW_LINES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude workflow line scan\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\nFiles checked:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + str(f) for f in files) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('inspected Claude mailbox workflows: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
